data.title: BeFra reports Q3 2025 results in Mexico, figures in nominal Mexican Pesos, following IFRS guidelines. President/CEO happy with solid performance.
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, Betterware de México, S.A.P.I. de C.V. (NYSE:BWMX) shared its Q3 2025 financial outcomes. All numbers are in nominal Mexican Pesos (Ps.) unless specified, following IFRS guidelines and subject to minor variations due to rounding. The report, approved by the Board of Directors, highlighted the President and CEO's positive message on BeFra's strong performance.

data.title: Nicolet Bankshares to merge with MidWestOne Financial Group, creating community banking franchise in Upper Midwest.
data.description: Merger forms top community banking franchise in the Upper Midwest region. The newly combined entity will serve a total of [number] communities across [number] states.

data.title: Archrock declares $0.21 per share quarterly dividend, $0.84 annually - payable on Nov 13, 2025 to stockholders of record.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, Archrock, Inc. declared a quarterly dividend of $0.21 per common stock share, totaling $0.84 per share annually. The dividend for the third quarter of 2025 is set to be distributed on November 13, 2025. This dividend is available to all stockholders recorded as such by November 4, 2025. Archrock, Inc. is listed as AROC on the NYSE.

data.title: Tesla shareholders voting on Musk's $900 billion pay plan, facing opposition from "Take Back Tesla" movement.
data.description: Tesla Inc may face challenges as shareholders meet on Nov. 6 to vote on CEO Elon Musk's new pay package, with a group known as "Take Back Tesla" urging shareholders to vote against it. The proposed pay package could be valued at up to $900 billion and requires Musk to be with Tesla for 10 years and meet certain milestones to receive the full amount. Critics argue that this is excessive, with Musk potentially becoming the first trillionaire and receiving an average annual compensation of almost $100 billion. The movement aims to mobilize union members and public interest groups to influence the vote. Musk's compensation plan is being scrutinized for its extravagance in comparison to his peers.

data.title: Boston Scientific beats Q3 revenue estimate with $5.07B and adjusted earnings of 75 cents. Expects 20% net sales growth in 2025.
data.description: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) announced on Wednesday their third-quarter 2025 revenues reached $5.07 billion, surpassing the estimated $4.97 billion. The company reported adjusted earnings of 75 cents, beating the consensus of 71 cents and their own guidance of 70-72 cents. Looking ahead, Boston Scientific projects a net sales growth of about 20% for 2025 on a reported basis and approximately 15.5% organically, exceeding prior estimates of 18%-19% and 12%-14% respectively. They anticipate fourth-quarter adjusted earnings between 77 and 79 cents, higher than the consensus of 76 cents. Sales for the upcoming quarter are predicted to fall between $5.22 billion and $5.31 billion.

data.title: MidWestOne Financial Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: MOFG) reports financial results for Q3 2025 in Iowa City on Oct 23, 2025.
data.description: In Iowa City, Iowa, on October 23, 2025, MidWest One Financial Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: MOFG) disclosed their third-quarter 2025 financial outcomes.

data.title: World Kinect Corp (NYSE: WKC) Q3 2025 Results: Gross profit $250M, net income $26M, EBITDA $94M, operating cash flow $116M.
data.description: In Miami, World Kinect Corporation (NYSE: WKC) disclosed its third-quarter 2025 financial outcomes. Key figures for the quarter include a gross profit of $250 million, GAAP net income of $26 million (equivalent to $0.46 per diluted share), and adjusted net income of $30 million (or $0.54 per diluted share). The company delivered an adjusted EBITDA of $94 million and produced $116 million in operating cash flow, with free cash flow standing at $102 million. In terms of year-over-year segment profitability, the Aviation sector saw a notable increase with a gross profit of $143 million.

data.title: Net Power Inc. (NYSE: NPWR) to release Q3 2025 update on Nov 13, with conference call on Nov 14 at 8:30 AM ET. Contact 877-407-8014 (domestic) or +1 201-689-8053 (international) to participate. Visit ir.netpower.com for webcast.
data.description: Net Power Inc. (NYSE: NPWR) intends to release its third quarter 2025 business update post the market closure on Thursday, November 13, 2025. A conference call is scheduled for Friday, November 14, 2025, commencing at 8:30 AM ET. You can access the live audio webcast of the call via Net Power’s investor relations website at ir.netpower.com. For phone participation, dial 877-407-8014 (domestic) or +1 201-689-8053 (international). A recorded webcast will be available afterwards.

data.title: Universal Display Corp announces recipient of inaugural Sherwin I. Seligsohn Innovation Award in Organic Electronics. #OLED
data.description: Ewing, New Jersey - Universal Display Corporation revealed the winner of the first-ever Sherwin I. Seligsohn Innovation Award. The award recognizes outstanding achievements in innovation within the corporation and the recipient was announced today.

data.title: Federated Hermes to acquire majority stake in FCP Fund Manager with $3.8 billion client assets, expands real estate capabilities in U.S. markets.
data.description: Federated Hermes has reaffirmed its dedication to enhancing its private markets and alternatives investment offerings, with a specific focus on expanding in the United States. This move will see an expansion of Federated Hermes' real estate capabilities into key U.S. markets, complementing its existing business in the United Kingdom. This strategic initiative aims to bolster FCP's foothold in these markets, signaling a significant development in the company's investment and growth plans.

data.title: Knowles Corporation (NYSE: KN) reports Q3 2025 results: strong revenues, cash flow; optimistic outlook for Q4.
data.description: Knowles Corporation (NYSE: KN), a prominent maker of specialty electronic components such as high-performance capacitors, RF filters, advanced medtech microphones, and balanced armature speakers, has reported its quarterly results for the period ending September 30, 2025. The company showcased strong performance during this quarter, meeting expectations with impressive numbers across various metrics. This included significant growth in revenues, cash generated from operating activities, and non-GAAP diluted EPS from continuing operations. The results demonstrate the company's continued success and positive outlook in the market.

data.title: Cohu to present at investor conferences on Nov 6 at Stifel Midwest and Nov 11 at Baird Global Industrial.
data.description: Poway, California - Cohu, Inc. (NASDAQ: COHU), a leading global provider of equipment and services aimed at improving semiconductor manufacturing yield and productivity, revealed plans to partake in upcoming investor conferences. The schedule includes participation at the Stifel 2025 Midwest 1x1 Conference at Waldorf Astoria in Chicago, IL on November 6, 2025, and the Baird 2025 Global Industrial Conference at The Ritz-Carlton, Chicago, IL on November 11, 2025. Interested portfolio managers and analysts are advised to reach out to secure their reservations.

data.title: Verisign Q3 2025: Revenue $419M, up 7.3% from Q3 2024; Operating income $284M vs $269M in Q3 2024.
data.description: VeriSign, Inc., a leading provider of internet infrastructure and domain registry services, released its financial results for Q3 2025. The company reported a revenue of $419 million, marking a 7.3% increase from Q3 2024. Operating income for Q3 2025 stood at $284 million, up from $269 million in Q3 2024. VeriSign continues to show strong performance in its core business operations.

data.title: Ford's Q3 2025 results announced, with a dividend of 15 cents per share declared for Q4. Shareholder website for more info.
data.description: Ford Motor Company (NYSE: F) released their third quarter 2025 financial results today. The company announced a fourth-quarter regular dividend of 15 cents per share, which will be paid on Dec. 1 to shareholders of record as of Nov. 7. To access the earnings release, presentation, and additional material, visit the Investor Relations website at shareholder.ford.com. At 5:00 p.m. ET, there will be a meeting with Ford and Ford Motor Credit Company management.

data.title: Eventbrite (NYSE: EB) to release Q3 financial results for 2025 on Nov 6 after market closes. Earnigs call at 2pm PT.
data.description: San Francisco-based Eventbrite (NYSE: EB), a global platform for shared experiences, is set to unveil its financial performance for the third quarter that concluded on September 30, 2025. The announcement will be made post-market closure on Thursday, November 6, 2025. For those interested, the Eventbrite Third Quarter 2025 Earnings Conference Call is scheduled for Thursday, November 6, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time). The live webcast can be accessed on https://investor.eventbrite.com. An archived version will be available after the event.

data.title: Western Union reports $1.03 billion revenue in Q3 2025, flat YoY on reported basis, adjusted revenue drops by 1% excluding Iraq.
data.description: In Denver, The Western Union Company (NYSE: WU) disclosed its financial results for the third quarter of 2025. The company reported revenues of $1.03 billion for the quarter, marking no significant change compared to the same period last year on a reported basis. Adjusted revenue, excluding Iraq, saw a 1% decrease. This shift in adjusted revenue was primarily due to positive growth in Consumer Services and Branded Digital sectors, which was partially offset by a decline in the North America retail business.

data.title: Paycom's report shows 43% of HR pros prioritizing tech upgrades in 2026, as per survey of 1,000 experts, Business Wire says.
data.description: In Oklahoma City, Paycom Software, Inc. (NYSE: PAYC) unveiled its latest annual report on HR trends, showcasing a significant focus on enhancing HR technology in the upcoming year. The report, based on a survey of more than 1,000 HR experts by PSB Insights, highlighted that 43% of participants intend to prioritize advancements in HR technology in 2026. Additionally, the study emphasized that 80% of HR professionals are anticipating improvements in this area. Paycom, known for its cloud-based human capital management software, continues to lead in providing innovative solutions for HR needs.

data.title: Artivion, Inc. (NYSE: AORT) to release Q3 2025 financial results on Nov. 6 after market close. Teleconference call scheduled.
data.description: Atlanta, October 23, 2025 - Artivion, Inc. (NYSE: AORT), a prominent cardiac and vascular surgery firm specializing in aortic disease, revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the third quarter of 2025 on Thursday, November 6, 2025, once the markets have concluded. The company's upcoming announcement is highly anticipated by investors and industry analysts alike.

data.title: Five9 will announce Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 6, 2025, at 4:30 pm Eastern Time. Participants can register for the webinar online.
data.description: SAN RAMON, California - Five9, Inc. (Nasdaq: FIVN), a leading provider of the Intelligent CX Platform, has announced the schedule for its third quarter 2025 financial results conference call. This event is set to take place on Thursday, November 6, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. Interested participants can sign up for the webinar at the specified time on November 6, 2025. Following the live session, a replay will be accessible. Both the live webcast and the replay will be provided on the Investor Relations platform.

data.title: Hanmi Bank's Anna Chung named to Women to Watch list, Hanmi's Community Lending Division recognized in American Banker’s Most Powerful Women in Banking 2025.
data.description: Anna Chung has been recognized as one of the women to watch on the Most Powerful Women in Banking list. Additionally, Hanmi Bank’s Community Lending Division has been acknowledged as a top team for the 2025 Most Powerful Women in Banking list. The achievements highlight the prominence of Anna Chung and the division's standing in the banking industry.
